# OpenClaw Mobile - Build Status

## Issue

The Flutter app generated overnight has **50+ files** with complex integration issues:
- Type naming conflicts (LogLevel, ThemeMode, ConnectionState)
- Missing StorageService methods
- API compatibility issues
- Import conflicts

## Solution Options

### Option 1: Fix All Errors (Complex)
- Rename conflicting types throughout codebase
- Implement missing service methods
- Fix API compatibility
- **Time:** 1-2 hours

### Option 2: Create Minimal Working APK (Recommended)
- Simplified app with 5-10 files
- Core features only (dashboard, chat, quick actions)
- Guaranteed to compile
- **Time:** 30 minutes
- **Can expand later**

### Option 3: Use Web PWA Instead
- Deploy as web app
- No compilation needed
- Works on all devices
- **Time:** 15 minutes
